links.description: icon.svg is a 32x32 rounded-square favicon/app icon: near-black background (#080808) with a faint white border, a large bold white monospace "J" dominant left-of-center, and a smaller muted-gray (#52525b) subscript "S" lower-right, forming a terminal/monospace-styled "J/S" monogram for JaySync-Lab. It is the site's brand icon, picked up automatically by the Next.js app router (src/app) as the favicon/app icon for the root layout.
